description: A PATCH carrying an If-Match value that no longer matches the resource's current ETag/revision (someone else wrote it first) is rejected with 412 Precondition Failed / REVISION_CONFLICT before the write is attempted, and the response surfaces the resource's current revision so the client can re-read and retry.

body.title: Precondition Failed
body.detail: If-Match "2" does not match the current revision, 3.
